subcodes.first_line: O ye two who are attracted to the Truth! Although divine bounties are beyond count or reckoning, and man stands feeble and powerless to render due thanks [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو منجذب حق هر چند نعم الهیه لایعد و لایحصی و انسان از شکرش عاجز و قاصر و
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love of God, @thankfulness; gratitude
